mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default, status, create_time, update_time FROM mall_user_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY is_default DESC, update_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mall_user_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1

SELECT id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default, status, create_time, update_time FROM mall_user_address WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mall_user_address (user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailAddress}, #{isDefault}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE mall_user_address SET receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, is_default = #{isDefault} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
UPDATE mall_user_address SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
UPDATE mall_user_address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 AND status = 1
UPDATE mall_user_address SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
